items.name: open-url
items.title: open-url
items.description: Open a URL in the user's default browser across macOS, Linux, Windows, WSL, SSH sessions, and headless CI. Fallback chain with BROWSER env override and manual print fallback.

items.name: json-mode
items.title: json-mode
items.description: Dual-rendering output helpers for CLIs serving both humans and agents. Auto-detects TTY vs piped, enforces stdout/stderr discipline, respects NO_COLOR. Never calls process.exit.

items.name: next-steps
items.title: next-steps
items.description: Post-command guidance for agents and humans. Emit structured next-step hints to stderr (NDJSON for agents, formatted block for humans). Chains with json-mode.

items.name: copy-clipboard
items.title: copy-clipboard
items.description: Copy text to the system clipboard across macOS, Linux (X11 + Wayland), Windows, and WSL. Typed verdict, never throws. Detects pbcopy, xclip, xsel, wl-copy, clip.exe automatically.

items.name: notify-os
items.title: notify-os
items.description: Fire a system notification across macOS (osascript), Linux (notify-send), Windows and WSL (PowerShell). Silently skips in CI. Typed verdict, never throws.

items.name: killswitch
items.title: killswitch
items.description: Binary safety gate. If ~/.app/KILLSWITCH exists, all write operations refuse. File exists = stopped. File gone = resumed. One fs.existsSync call. Battle-tested in hapi-cli for real brokerage orders.
